lines.speaker: Son
lines.line: Hi Mom, can you hear me? The connection is a bit slow.
lines.trans: 妈，你能听到吗？网络有点慢。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.line: Yes, I can see you! Are you eating well? You look a little thin.
lines.trans: 能听到，能看到你！吃得好吗？你看起来有点瘦。

lines.speaker: Son
lines.line: I am fine, Mom. I eat at the school cafeteria every day. The food is pretty good.
lines.trans: 我挺好的，妈。我每天都在学校食堂吃饭。饭菜还不错。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.line: That is good. Did you wash the new sweater I sent you?
lines.trans: 那就好。我给你寄的新毛衣你洗了吗？

lines.speaker: Son
lines.line: Not yet. I will wash it this weekend. Thanks for sending it.
lines.trans: 还没。我这周末洗。谢谢你寄过来。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.line: It is getting cold. Remember to wear it. And do not stay up too late.
lines.trans: 天冷了。记得穿上。还有不要睡太晚。

lines.speaker: Son
lines.line: I know, Mom. I am doing well in my classes too. Do not worry.
lines.trans: 我知道，妈。我功课也挺好的。别担心。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.line: That is my boy. I will transfer some money to your account tomorrow.
lines.trans: 这才是我的好孩子。我明天往你账户转点钱。

lines.speaker: Son
lines.line: You do not have to, Mom. I have enough. But thank you.
lines.trans: 不用了，妈。我够花的。不过还是谢谢你。

lines.speaker: Mom
lines.line: Take care, son. Call me again next week.
lines.trans: 照顾好自己，儿子。下周再给我打视频。
